text: Being here, enclosed by glass and illuminated by the cool fluorescence and sharp colors of this exhibition, I feel the weight of observation. The deliberate design and arrangement evoke both curiosity and a kind of tension—as if my presence is part of the display, my thoughts included in this interplay between visibility and concealment. I sense a dance between openness and secrecy, and it leaves me alert, almost exposed, yet deeply absorbed by the questions the space itself is asking me about perception and connection.
